title: nuttallia tricuspis
intro: Nuttallia tricuspis, also known as three-cusped nuttallia, is a species of saltwater clams and is a type of marine bivalve mollusk. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nuttallia tricuspis are thought to include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Nuttallia tricuspis is often dried and powdered, then used in capsules or teas to harness its medicinal properties.
